description.ko: 비에 젖은 사이버펑크 메트로폴리스의 중앙 신경 허브로, 에너지와 데이터가 도시의 생명혈처럼 흐르는 곳입니다.
description.en: The central neural hub of a rain-drenched cyberpunk metropolis, where energy and data flow like the lifeblood of the city.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Cobalt Thalamus.' At the heart of a rainy megacity, a massive #1A0033 indigo power core pulses with #FF00FF magenta neon and #00FFFF cyan holographic data streams. Heavy downpour creates ray-traced puddle reflections on wet metallic asphalt, while high-speed maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, dense smoky volumetric atmosphere, and flickering lens flares from giant advertising screens. 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a future city.
